nodes.context: Second oldest criminal street gang in New York City, active in Five Points area, composed of Irish immigrants.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Forty Thieves, Shirt Tails, Chichesters, Dead Rabbits, Tammany Hall
edges.context: The infobox lists Forty Thieves as an ally of the Kerryonians.

edges.evidence_quote: The Kerryonians also fought a gang named the " Pelters ".
The Kerryonians were eventually absorbed into the growing street gangs of Five Points such as the Dead Rabbits, Roach Guards, and Chichesters.
edges.context: The Kerryonians were absorbed into the Dead Rabbits.
